description:
Offered: every semester
A large instrumental ensemble studying, rehearsing and performing contemporary and traditional orchestra literature. Open to all students with experience playing an orchestral instrument. Partially satisfies the ensemble requirement for music minors. Extra performances required.
Note: May be repeated for credit 10 times. 3 such credits can be counted toward one Gen Ed designation.
Meets General Education Requirement(s): AIA, DP, FA, IHIP
